text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 123 

IP_ADMSN_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Inpatient Admission Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating the type and priority of the beneficiary's admission to a facility for the Inpatient 
hospital stay. 

SHORT NAME: TYPE_ADM 

LONG NAME: IP_ADMSN_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: This code set is an external code set maintained by the National Uniform Billing Committee 
(NUBC™)
